tools.name: GitHub Copilot CLI
tools.install: Install GitHub Copilot CLI from the official GitHub distribution.
tools.upgrade: Run copilot update or use the package manager used to install Copilot CLI.

tools.name: Superpowers for GitHub Copilot
tools.install: Install Superpowers from the configured Copilot plugin marketplace.
tools.upgrade: Update the Superpowers plugin with GitHub Copilot CLI.

tools.name: CodeGraph
tools.install: Install CodeGraph and expose the codegraph command to Copilot CLI.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade CodeGraph with its installation package manager.

tools.name: Tokscale
tools.install: Install Tokscale globally with npm install --global tokscale@latest and expose the tokscale command on PATH.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade Tokscale to the latest release with the package manager used to install it.
